variants: Heribert Volz is a proficient artisan known for his Obsidian Smithing Certificate, which he has leveraged to create intricate metalwork. He completed his doctoral studies under the mentorship of Kylie Larkin, whose guidance was pivotal in shaping his craft. Heribert's research on smithing techniques has been published in the Echo Fern Library, contributing to the field's academic understanding. His work is supported by the Yearling Roots Circle, a primary funding source for his ongoing projects. In addition to his artistic pursuits, Heribert contributes to his community as a Citizenship Coach at Polestar Assembly, helping individuals navigate their civic responsibilities.

The career of Heribert Volz has been marked by his achievements in smithing, notably highlighted by his Obsidian Smithing Certificate. The foundation of his unique approach to this craft was influenced significantly by his mentor, Kylie Larkin, during his academic journey. He has also published his insights in the Echo Fern Library, reaching audiences interested in metallurgical techniques. Funding for his innovative works is primarily provided by the Yearling Roots Circle. Beyond his professional life, Heribert serves as a Citizenship Coach at Polestar Assembly, where he assists community members in understanding their civic duties.
